strengths: Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents, with direct experience building end-to-end enterprise automation tools at re:cinq and Optilyz.
Deep hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the required AI agent development skill in the job description.
Demonstrated leadership in developer tooling, CI/CD pipelines, and testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest equivalents), including founding open-source testing libraries and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js, TypeScript, and testing practices align closely with their purpose.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor communication challenges in a Berlin-based enterprise team.
Recent role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) is in the future relative to current date, raising minor timeline ambiguity, though likely a typo.
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume demonstrates a rare depth in full-stack engineering with direct alignment to the role’s stack and responsibilities—particularly in building internal automation tools, integrating APIs, and developing AI-agent infrastructure using TypeScript and Node.js. His consistent track record of shipping complex systems, leading testing practices, and contributing to developer tooling makes him not just a fit, but a multiplier for engineering quality and innovation.
